introSection: Bobsleigh (Japanese: ボブスレー) was a steel roller coaster previously located at Nara Dreamland in Nara, Nara, Japan.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride was based on the Matterhorn Bobsleds at Disneyland. This was because the park was supposed to become the official Japanese Disney park, with Bobsleigh being an opening day attraction. Negotiations between Disney fell through just before the park opened, and it opened without any official Disney license. This gives Bobsleigh a weird position; it wasn't meant to be a knock off, but it did come across as one due to its situation.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The trains were designed to resemble bobsleighs.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * Official Sansei PDF featuring the coaster

fullText:
Bobsleigh (Japanese: ボブスレー) was a steel roller coaster previously located at Nara Dreamland in Nara, Nara, Japan.

The ride was based on the Matterhorn Bobsleds at Disneyland. This was because the park was supposed to become the official Japanese Disney park, with Bobsleigh being an opening day attraction. Negotiations between Disney fell through just before the park opened, and it opened without any official Disney license. This gives Bobsleigh a weird position; it wasn't meant to be a knock off, but it did come across as one due to its situation.

White track and supports.

The trains were designed to resemble bobsleighs.


 * Official Sansei PDF featuring the coaster
